firebase-mcp-server.note: Firebase MCP — MUST use instead of terminal firebase CLI for all Firebase operations. Three-layer auth: CLI token, MCP OAuth2 session, ADC.

chrome-devtools-mcp.note: Chrome DevTools MCP — MUST use instead of external screenshot tools. Owns all browser interaction, performance tracing, and Lighthouse audits.

StitchMCP._note: PLATFORM-NATIVE: Managed by Antigravity MCP Store. Do NOT add command/httpUrl here — it will override the platform injection and crash.

google-developer-knowledge._note: PLATFORM-NATIVE: Managed by Antigravity MCP Store. Do NOT add command/httpUrl here. Fallback: firebase-mcp-server.developerknowledge_* tools.

sequential-thinking.note: Sequential Thinking MCP — MUST use for architecture decisions, multi-step reasoning, and complex problem decomposition. No ad-hoc reasoning lists.

jules-mcp-server.note: Jules MCP Server — MUST use for all Jules session management and autonomous code generation tasks.

gcloud.note: gcloud MCP — Natural language interface to gcloud CLI. MUST use instead of raw terminal gcloud commands.

observability.note: Cloud Observability MCP — MUST use for all Cloud Logging, Monitoring, and Trace queries.

storage.note: Cloud Storage MCP — MUST use for all GCS bucket and object operations.

mcp-toolbox._note: MCP Toolbox for Databases v1.2.0 — Go binary, NOT an NPM package. Deployed via OCI: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/database-toolbox/toolbox/toolbox:1.2.0. Transport: streamable-http on port 5000. Config: tools.yaml. Supports 40+ data sources including AlloyDB, Spanner, BigQuery, Cloud SQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, MongoDB, Snowflake. OAuth 2.1 resource server for MCP Authorization. Cloned at: external_repos/mcp-toolbox/

anti_patterns: NEVER use search_web for Google API documentation — use google-developer-knowledge MCP
NEVER use terminal for firebase deploy — use firebase-mcp-server MCP
NEVER take screenshots with external tools — use chrome-devtools-mcp MCP
NEVER hand-code design tokens — use StitchMCP
NEVER use ad-hoc reasoning lists — use sequential-thinking MCP
NEVER run gcloud CLI directly in terminal when gcloud MCP can handle it
NEVER guess Cloud Run service state — use cloud-run MCP to query live state
NEVER write Cloud Logging filters by hand — use observability MCP structured queries
NEVER use NotebookLM for RAG — use gemini-memory (Epistemic Engine) for all memory operations
NEVER ingest files matching .geminiignore into the Epistemic Engine
